summary: Tested iteration 54 features: 3 new repayment modes for current accounts (schedule, percentage, fixed-period). All 21 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified with all required elements and functionality working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: NULLABLE_FIELDS handling in PUT correctly allows clearing repayment_percentage, repayment_fixed_amount, etc. with null values
Backend: Auto-deduction filter correctly picks up accounts with any mode enabled (auto_deduct_enabled OR repayment_percentage>0 OR repayment_fixed_amount>0)
Backend: Idempotency implemented via unique reference patterns: AUTO-PCT-{date}, AUTO-FIX-{period_key}, AUTO-{schedule_id}-{date}
Backend: Period-end logic correct: daily=always, weekly=Sunday(weekday=6), monthly=last day, yearly=Dec 31
Backend: Repayment cap enforced - deductions never exceed total_advance - already_repaid
Frontend: All 3 mode config blocks present with correct colors (cyan=schedule, purple=%, amber=fixed)
Frontend: Pre-fill values working: 5% for percentage, 10000 F weekly for fixed
Frontend: Account card badges correctly show all 3 modes when enabled
seed_data_creation: Test accounts created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 54 added 3 repayment modes for current accounts: (1) Schedule-based auto-deduction (existing, uses auto_deduct_enabled), (2) Percentage of daily revenue (repayment_percentage), (3) Fixed amount per period (repayment_fixed_amount + repayment_fixed_period + repayment_fixed_start_date). All modes can coexist on same account. Idempotency is critical - each mode uses unique reference patterns to prevent duplicates.

backend: POST /api/current-accounts accepts new fields: repayment_percentage, repayment_fixed_amount, repayment_fixed_period, repayment_fixed_start_date
PUT /api/current-accounts/{id} can set/clear nullable fields (NULLABLE_FIELDS handling)
Auto-deduction filter picks up accounts with any mode enabled
Percentage mode: reference=AUTO-PCT-{date}, idempotent per day
Fixed mode daily: deducts every day, reference=AUTO-FIX-YYYY-MM-DD
Fixed mode weekly: only on Sundays, reference=AUTO-FIX-YYYY-Wnn, idempotent per week
Fixed mode monthly: only on last day of month, reference=AUTO-FIX-YYYY-MM
Fixed mode yearly: only on Dec 31, reference=AUTO-FIX-YYYY
Repayment cap: deductions never exceed total_advance - already_repaid
All 3 modes can run together on same account
Manual repayments still work alongside auto modes
Invalid period validation on create (nullified) and update (400 error)
frontend: Modal shows auto-deduct-toggle (schedule mode) with cyan styling
Modal shows pct-mode-toggle + pct-value-input with purple styling
Modal shows fixed-mode-toggle + fixed-amount-input + fixed-period-select + fixed-start-input with amber styling
Enabling fixed mode pre-fills 10000 F + weekly
Account card shows auto-deduct-badge-{id} when schedule mode enabled
Account card shows pct-badge-{id} with '{N}% / jour' format
Account card shows fixed-badge-{id} with '{amount} F / jour|semaine|mois|an' format
All 3 badges can appear together on same card
Edit modal correctly loads saved values
